completed_tasks.name: /impeccable:optimize — useMemo sort, CLS fix, narrow transitions (committed d0e3cd5)
/impeccable:adapt — touch targets, badge sizes, grid icon (committed d0e3cd5)
/impeccable:harden pass 2 — 21 fixes: 5 SortableHeaders keyboard, 6 table captions, window.confirm→Dialog, 4 aria-labels, 2 token fixes, 2 transition narrows

decisions.decision: Added success/warning semantic token families to design system
decisions.rationale: Emerald=success, amber=warning pattern repeated in 8+ files. Tokens enable theme-wide color changes.
Unique 5-color scale already centralized in one config. No semantic equivalent.
Intentional brand accent in single component.

decisions.decision: Left raw tags — deferred next/image migration
decisions.rationale: R2 not configured, thumbnails have CSS dimensions. Migration needs remotePatterns.

decisions.decision: Deferred icon button touch target sizing
decisions.rationale: p-1.5 = 27px (below 44px). Fix affects desktop density, better as dedicated task.

decisions.decision: Copied keyboard pattern from supply-table-view to 5 other SortableHeaders
decisions.rationale: Only one of 6 identical implementations had keyboard support.

decisions.decision: Replaced window.confirm() with Dialog in chart-edit-modal
decisions.rationale: Missed in Phase 3 gap closure. Native confirm breaks design system.

decisions.decision: Left Top Genre badge hard-coded amber as P3
decisions.rationale: Semantically accent, not warning. No clean token mapping.

next_action: Commit 12 modified files, then /clear and /impeccable:polish for optional P3 fixes, then /impeccable:audit for final score, then deploy.
context_notes: Two full audit cycles. Score: 13/20 → 15/20 with fixes applied. Harden pass 2 addressed all P1 (keyboard SortableHeaders, table captions, window.confirm) and most P2 (aria-labels, token fixes, transition narrows). Only P3s remain (Top Genre badge, icon touch targets, raw img tags). Build clean, 350/350 tests pass.
